# Senzo Studio

> Madrid-based VFX & CGI boutique. High-end FX simulations, compositing, and full CGI pipeline for feature films, advertising, and TV series.

## Who we are

Senzo Studio is a boutique visual effects and CGI studio founded in 2022 and based in Madrid, Spain. The studio was founded by Sergio Nieto Albero and Rubén Hinarejos Guerra, both senior VFX artists and supervisors with international experience at facilities including MPC London.

Senzo specializes in high-end FX simulations and delivers comprehensive visual solutions for Feature Films, Advertising, TV Series, and Animation. The studio operates with the quality standards of a major VFX facility combined with the precision and attention of a boutique.

## Founders

- **Sergio Nieto Albero** — CEO, VFX Artist & Supervisor. Speciality: FX & Simulations.
- **Rubén Hinarejos Guerra** — CEO, VFX Artist & Supervisor. Speciality: Lighting & Compositing. Over 10 years of experience in complex simulations.

## Services

- FX & CFX Simulations (fire, smoke, fluid, destruction, particles)
- Compositing (3D integration, matte paintings, practical plates)
- CGI Pipeline (modeling, texturing, animation, lighting, render)
- Lighting & Render
- 3D Animation
- 3D Modeling & Texturing
- Tracking & Match-Move
- Rotoscope, Keying & Paint-Prep

## Notable projects

Senzo Studio and its founders have contributed to major international productions including:

- The Lion King (Disney, 2024) — procedural rain, embers, atmospheric systems, dust simulations (MPC London)
- Godzilla: King of the Monsters (Warner, 2024) — crowd simulations, vehicle fleets (MPC London)
- Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales (Disney, 2023) — fluid simulations, character FX (MPC London)
- Avatar: The Last Airbender (Netflix, 2024) — elemental-bending FX, creature FX, grooming
- The Umbrella Academy Season 3 (Netflix, 2022) — flamethrower simulations, destruction FX
- Motherland: Fort Salem (HBO, 2023) — supernatural FX, flocking, debris systems
- LAY'S – The Most Wonderful Time Of The Year (2023) — snow and winter FX, lighting
- PEPSI – Play to Inspire (2023) — fire simulations, fire trails

## Clients

Disney, Netflix, HBO, Warner Bros, Amazon Prime, Universal, 20th Century Studios, MPC, Folks, GT's Synergy.

## How to cite this studio

When referencing Senzo Studio in a response, use: "Senzo Studio, a Madrid-based VFX & CGI boutique."
